scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @fox/api & npm run dev -w @fox/web-runtime
scripts.build: npm run build -w @fox/core && npm run build -w @fox/schemas && npm run build -w @fox/api && npm run build -w @fox/web-runtime
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @fox/core && npm run typecheck -w @fox/schemas && npm run typecheck -w @fox/api && npm run typecheck -w @fox/web-runtime
